title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Aksa21 Ltd
body: "Application number 5402  Applicant AXA objected to the name used by Aksa21 Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 5 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Aksa21 Ltd is changed to 16386219, Ltd. "
